33064 0 R.description: Defines the clickable rectangle, border behavior, and the action or destination triggered by the selected hyperlink.

33068 0 R.description: Defines an internal jump action. Its /D entry points to the destination page or named destination.

396 0 R.description: Owns page-level dictionaries such as /MediaBox, /Resources, /Contents, and /Annots.

33067 0 R.description: Defines what happens when the annotation is activated. The /S entry is /JavaScript.

component.label: 属性 电气工程 部件属性 部件: FES.195746

items.source_comment: This component candidate comes from the original PDF annotation metadata. When available, the JavaScript `highlight(...)` rectangle is used; otherwise the annotation `/Rect` is used.
